com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class InputAccount.InputAreaParams

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAreaParams
  • Enclosing class:
    InputAccount

    public static class InputAccount.InputAreaParams
extends java.lang.Object

      Sets the image to appear to the left of the text.

      Input area offset from the X axis
      int offsetY

    • Field Detail

      • width

        public int width
        Input area width

      • height

        public int height
        Input area height

      • offsetX

        public int offsetX
        Input area offset from the X axis

      • offsetY

        public int offsetY
        Input area offset from the Y axis

      • hint

        public java.lang.String hint
        hint message.

      • strokeColor

        public java.lang.String strokeColor
        The color of the stroke.If the format is wrong, the default color is used. Supported formats are:

        • #RRGGBB
        • #AARRGGBB

        The following names are also accepted: red, blue, green, black, white, gray, cyan, magenta, yellow, lightgray, darkgray, grey, lightgrey, darkgrey, aqua, fuchsia, lime, maroon, navy, olive, purple, silver, and teal.

        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • strokeWidth

        public int strokeWidth
        The width in pixels of the stroke
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • cornerRadius

        public int cornerRadius
        The radius in pixels of the corners of the rectangle shape
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • paddingLeft

        public int paddingLeft
        the left padding in pixels
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • paddingRight

        public int paddingRight
        the right padding in pixels
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • paddingTop

        public int paddingTop
        the top padding in pixels
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • paddingBottom

        public int paddingBottom
        the bottom padding in pixels
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • leftImg

        public byte[] leftImg
        Sets the image to appear to the left of the text. The array size cannot exceed 100K.
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • imgWidth

        public int imgWidth
        image width
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • imgHeight

        public int imgHeight
        image height
        Since:
        V1.08.00
